sourceNotes: Astypalaia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 1083976469 and AllOverGreece GPS 36.51417,26.33813 identify this record as Agios Ioannis Richtis. Sources describe boat access or a difficult 30-40 minute descent from the chapel, pebbles, no organization, and secluded conditions.

Popular-source confidence pass CP 2026-06-05: AllOverGreece directly identifies Agios Ioannis Richtis at GPS 36.51417,26.33813 and supports pebble beach, boat/path access, no organized beach, no family/nudist/blue-flag/accessibility/sports claims, no shade and about a 30-minute descent from the chapel. Delis Rent A Car Astypalaia also supports pebbled terrain, difficult 30-40 minute descent, unorganized status and very few visitors. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; source secluded/beautiful wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

GreekTravel supports Marmari a few hundred meters down the road from Astypalaia Camping with the Ta Mamounia cafe; Greece Moments supports Marmari beach by the main road with Mamounia All Day Bar drinks/snacks in summer; AllOverGreece supports Marmari beach near these coordinates with sand/pebble terrain, very easy access and no full organized-beach profile. This pass corrects the legacy src/data boat-only mirror. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 organized audit 2026-05-25: removed organized claim; Mple Limanaki sources describe a small hidden cove without direct sunbed/umbrella service.

Popular-source confidence pass CP 2026-06-05: Delis Rent A Car Astypalaia and Vithos Astypalaia directly support Mple Limanaki / Blue Harbor as a small pebbled cove near Maltezana reached by a short walk/dirt path and unorganized. Corrected unsupported road/nearby-service/shade/shallow certainty to path access, pebbled terrain, no organized services, no explicit shade support and neutral medium depth. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; source hidden/turquoise/popular wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

metadata.sourceNotes: Astypalaia evidence pass 2026-06-02: the municipal swim page includes Plakes among the smaller Astypalaia coves, and the Astypalaia-island page supports easy signposted access from the main road with a short downhill path, pebbles/rock slabs, snorkeling appeal, no organized service, and deep water. No windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/safe claim was changed.
